# Store Information

## Location

**Address:** 42 Market Street, Shoreditch, London, E1 6RF, United Kingdom

**Directions:** We are located on the corner of Market Street and Brick Lane, a 3-minute walk from Shoreditch High Street station (Overground). The nearest bus stops are on Bethnal Green Road (routes 8 and 388).

## Opening Hours

| Day | Hours |
|---|---|
| Monday – Friday | 09:00 – 18:00 |
| Saturday | 10:00 – 17:00 |
| Sunday | 11:00 – 16:00 |
| Public Holidays | Closed |

We are closed on all UK public holidays. Please check our website for any seasonal variations.

## Parking

Free street parking is available on Market Street on Saturdays and Sundays. On weekdays a pay-and-display car park is situated 200 metres away on Quaker Street (charges apply Mon–Fri 08:00–20:00). The nearest NCP multi-storey is on Bethnal Green Road, approximately 5 minutes on foot.
